drifted.spec_text: All 15 demos run successfully through both AllDemos runners
drifted.actual: AllDemos.fsx and demos 06-15 use broken 'open Prelude.DemoHelpers' — module does not exist after Prelude refactor

drifted.spec_text: Each demo MUST produce visually distinct, interesting physics interactions
drifted.actual: Viewer renders all objects at default unit size instead of actual physics dimensions — causes visual merging

drifted.spec_text: Camera positioning MUST support viewing key interactions
drifted.actual: Demo 04 evolved from bowling ball + pyramid to wrecking ball + brick wall during collaborative iteration

drifted.spec_text: User confirms each demo is satisfying during per-demo review
drifted.actual: Only demos 01-05 reviewed collaboratively; demos 06-15 pending
